name: Honey Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 chicken breast, whole, medium, skinned, and halved lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine honey, mustard, lemon juice, poppy seeds, and pepper in a small bowl. Stir together well.
2. Rinse the chicken; pat dry. Place chicken, bone side up, on the unheated rack of a broiler pan.
3. Broil 4 to 5 inches from heat for 15 minutes.
4. Turn the chicken over. Continue broiling for 10 minutes.
5. Brush with honey-mustard mixture. Broil about 5 more minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
6. If desired, garnish with very thin strips of citrus peel.
